basic_details.job_title: Primary Forest Produce Cooperative Society Bilaspur – Manager – 1 Posts

basic_details.short_information: Primary Forest Produce Cooperative Society Bilaspur Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Manager. Candidates with Diploma/Degree Can Apply Offline. The offline application starts on 28-05-2026, and closes on 20-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Primary Forest Produce Cooperative Society Bilaspur official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Higher Secondary (10+2), Computer Diploma/Degree (1 year) from recognized institute

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Primary Forest Produce Cooperative Society Bilaspur Manager Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
